name: @bojackduy/opencode-telescope
description: Fuzzy search across all OpenCode conversations — grep session and chat history, find code snippets, and jump to any chat instantly

scripts.release:patch: bun run typecheck && bun test && npm version patch -m "chore: release %s" && git push && git push origin $(git describe --tags --abbrev=0)
scripts.release:minor: bun run typecheck && bun test && npm version minor -m "chore: release %s" && git push && git push origin $(git describe --tags --abbrev=0)
scripts.release:major: bun run typecheck && bun test && npm version major -m "chore: release %s" && git push && git push origin $(git describe --tags --abbrev=0)
